summary: First iteration testing of EKIPA Z JEEPA. Backend: 21/21 pytest passed (auth, public lists, admin CRUD, AI chat, AI match summary). Frontend: all 6 public pages load, login -> /admin works, admin tabs render, AI summary buttons present, mobile menu toggle works. Floating chatbot toggle button is found but clicking it does NOT open the chatbot-panel (panel never appears in DOM after click). Backend AI chat endpoint itself works correctly when called directly.

minor.issue: set_cookie uses secure=False; OK for HTTP preview but should be True in production

CORS_ORIGINS='*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per spec; browser will reject credentialed requests from arbitrary origins. In this preview the frontend is same-origin so it works, but it should be set to explicit origin list.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid=chatbot-toggle] does not render [data-testid=chatbot-panel]. Panel element is absent from DOM after click. Public users cannot access AI assistant from UI even though backend /api/ai/chat works.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test send because panel never opens. Possible cause: state toggle handler not wired, button overlapped by 'Made with Emergent' badge in bottom-right, or onClick prevented.

action_items: Fix ChatBot panel not opening when toggle is clicked. Verify onClick handler updates open state, confirm panel renders conditionally based on state, and check z-index / overlap with bottom-right 'Made with Emergent' badge which sits in same screen corner as the chatbot button.
Tighten CORS_ORIGINS to explicit list of allowed origins (allow_credentials=True is incompatible with '*').
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~600 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, news, players, matches, gallery, ai) and a separate seed module.
AI endpoints import emergentintegrations inside the handler on every call — move to module-level import for performance.
Match.date stored as ISO string but Match model expects datetime; _parse_match_doc handles it but inconsistent storage type is fragile.
set_auth_cookies uses secure=False — should be True when behind HTTPS (production).
seed_data_creation: Auto-seeded by backend on startup (10 players, 6 matches, 3 news, 6 gallery items, 1 admin user). No additional seed needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green via /app/backend/tests/test_ekipa_backend.py (21 tests, ~20s incl AI). Login redirects to /admin successfully. Admin tabs Aktualnosci/Zawodnicy/Mecze/Galeria all render. AI summary buttons exist with [data-testid=admin-match-ai-{id}] (3 finished matches). The one outstanding bug is the floating ChatBot — toggle button is present but the panel does not render after click; investigate /app/frontend/src/components/ChatBot.jsx state/render logic and possible overlap with 'Made with Emergent' badge in bottom-right corner.
rca of the issue: ChatBot panel: After clicking [data-testid=chatbot-toggle], query for [data-testid=chatbot-panel] returns null. Likely root causes: (1) onClick toggles state but parent re-render closes it, (2) panel rendered conditionally only when `open && false`, or (3) the visible pink circle at bottom-right is the Emergent badge and not the chatbot toggle, while the actual chatbot toggle is off-screen or hidden. Reproduction: open '/', wait for networkidle, click [data-testid=chatbot-toggle] with force=True, check panel — none appears.
